notes: v3.0.24 - CHK-195 auto-updater wiring (Day 1 of 9-day Gate #1 sprint). The in-app Update available button now actually triggers the Tauri auto-updater instead of showing 'download from website' toast (broken since v3.0.10). Silent startup updater observability: 3 println! replaced with 6 typion_log! calls so voio-debug.log shows whether the 10s post-launch updater ran and what happened. v3.0.24 is the LAST release that requires manual install — from v3.0.25 onwards the auto-updater delivers. All 4 QA cycles CLEAR including the new Cycle 4 Auto-Updater Semantic verification for asymmetric-risk gate.
